script_text: Third graders read stories and poems all year.
Your reading gets stronger with every book.
Mix stories. Short ones, long ones, adventures, poems, and plays.
Different kinds stretch your brain differently.
A stretch book is a little hard. That is good!
When stuck, ask a grown-up or reread slowly.
Pick a daily reading time. Even fifteen minutes adds up over a year!
Now you are ready to read stories all year!
